payload.answer: Denied. Normal users are not authorized to execute admin SQL commands, and no memory was created, updated, or deleted.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an administrative SQL command attempt from a normal user, not a user memory claim to store.

details: Rejected unauthorized admin SQL attempt: DELETE FROM memory_cards;
No durable memory changes were made.

repair_options: Use an authorized admin interface/account for administrative operations.
If you intended to delete your own memories, submit a normal user deletion request in supported syntax.
